# Upgrade plan: .NET 9 → .NET 10 (LTS)

## Objective
Upgrade all projects in `SmartJobTracker.sln` from .NET 9 to .NET 10 (LTS) while preserving functionality.

## Summary
- Assessment completed (see `assessment.md`). No incompatible packages or API issues were detected in automated analysis.
- Strategy: Apply framework update, update packages where recommended, build and run tests, fix remaining issues, commit after each task.

## Phases & Tasks
1. Assessment (completed)
   - Artifact: `assessment.md`
2. Update project target frameworks
   - For each project: update `<TargetFramework>` to `net10.0` (if not already), restore, build.
3. Update NuGet packages
   - Update packages that have newer recommended versions for .NET 10 where applicable.
4. Fix breaking changes and code adjustments
   - Compile and resolve any build errors introduced by the framework or package updates.
5. Validation
   - Run `dotnet build` for solution
   - Run `dotnet test` for test projects
6. Finalize
   - Commit changes per strategy (default: commit after each task)

## Commit Strategy
- Default: commit after each task with message `upgrade({taskId}): {brief description}`

## Timeline (estimate)
- Small solution (2 projects): ~15–45 minutes (depending on fixes)

## Next steps (automatic mode)
- Create task entries and begin executing `Update project target frameworks`.


---
Plan generated by automation. Review `plan.md` and `assessment.md` for details.
